items.title: Adaptation needs in robotic systems
items.summary:
Hi robotic developers,

Are you working with Behavior Trees, robotics, ROS/ROS 2, autonomous systems, or robot decision-making?

We are conducting a research study on adaptation needs in robotic systems that use Behavior Trees. If you work with robotic systems, we’d greatly appreciate your input.

items.title: Does anyone else struggle to get accurate inertia and mass values for 3D-printed parts in sim?
items.summary:
I was playing around with a LeRobot SO101 arm and simulating it in [MuJoCo/PyBullet/Gazebo]. Something that kept bugging me: CAD tools, URDF exporters, (and slicers’ STEP exports) compute the inertia tensor as if the part is a solid block of plastic which is not accurate at all.

When you feed that solid-block inertia into a simulator, the

items.title: Boston Dynamics brings its legged robots to the FIFA World Cup
items.summary:
